title: scoparia australis
intro: Scoparia australis, also known as Asian tea or Scoparia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Scoparia australis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
